remainingFindings.title: 园长 AI 助手有生成请求，但派单/任务闭环不可用
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Director AI suggestions still lack dispatch/task closure and production task backend.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Run D06 and define suggestion handling, dispatch statuses, and backend writes.

remainingFindings.title: 周报/运营报表可生成但导出、分享、反馈详情和派单均未开放
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Weekly/operations report export, share, feedback details, and dispatch remain unavailable; D07 leaves these controls disabled.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Define report product scope before implementing archive, export, share, and feedback details.

remainingFindings.title: 儿童档案等管理操作主要是本地 store，未观察到真实 CRUD 后端
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Child profile add and attendance changes use D01 demo persistence, but production CRUD backend is still missing.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Add real children/attendance CRUD APIs and server-side scope checks.

remainingFindings.title: 教师管理功能入口和路由缺失
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Teacher management routes and feature entry points are still missing.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Define teacher management scope, role policy, and page/API contract.

remainingFindings.title: 健康/饮食/成长汇总图表依赖前端 store 与演示数据，缺少真实聚合查询
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Director health/diet/growth aggregates still depend on D01 demo/store data instead of production aggregate queries.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Implement server-side aggregate queries and replace static/demo metrics.

remainingFindings.title: 园长 AI 建议可请求但建议处理/派单依赖通知事件后端，可用性不稳定
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Director AI suggestions can be requested, but handling/dispatch closure is incomplete.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Merge into D06 dispatch closure work.

remainingFindings.title: 园长周报可生成/刷新但没有保存为周报记录的提交链路
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Weekly reports can be generated/refreshed but cannot be saved as report records.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Implement weekly report archive/save/share APIs.

remainingFindings.title: 幼儿档案新增显示保存成功但 demo 下仅本地持久化，编辑功能未开放
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Add and attendance fake-success is fixed; edit/delete remain unavailable.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Define edit/delete/archive rules and backend CRUD, or keep controls disabled.

remainingFindings.title: 教师语音/OCR 草稿入口使用 buildMock 和 placeholder provider
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Teacher voice/OCR drafts are still demo samples with placeholder providers, though they are now labeled as demo drafts.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Decide whether real ASR/OCR is in scope; if yes, add providers, failures, and persistence boundaries.

remainingFindings.title: 家长趋势查询在 brain 不可用时直接 503，缺少本地或后端实现
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Parent trend query still lacks a production backend or stable fallback contract.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Define parent trend API/fallback behavior and add tests.

remainingFindings.title: 园长 pixel replica 看板包含静态图表与档案行，属于 visual/mock metrics
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Director pixel replica metrics remain visual/mock metrics; D07 only labels unavailable actions.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Replace static metrics in D06 using D01 or backend aggregates.

remainingFindings.title: 周报预览有生成 API，但没有保存/归档周报接口
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Weekly report preview has a generation API but no save/archive report API.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Implement report record model, save, export, and share flow.

remainingFindings.title: 家长反馈附件/语音图片补充是 disabled 占位入口
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Parent feedback attachments, voice, and image additions remain disabled placeholders.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Define attachment/voice/image scope; if in scope, add upload, scanning, and authorization.

remainingFindings.title: Teacher and high-risk AI APIs trust client supplied role and child scope
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Teacher and high-risk AI APIs still need production server-side session, role, child, and class scope checks.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Add non-forgeable authorization checks in real APIs.

remainingFindings.title: Admin AI endpoints do not require an admin session before using institution payload
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Admin AI endpoints still need production admin session enforcement.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Add server-side admin authorization in admin AI routes or API gateway.

remainingFindings.title: Health file bridge and teacher voice APIs accept childId without server scope validation
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Health material and teacher voice APIs still need server-side child/class scope checks.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Add scope checks when real upload and voice APIs are connected.

remainingFindings.title: Class and account scope use className/childIds but lack stable classId teacherId parentId relationships
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Stable classId, teacherId, and parentId relationships remain a production data-model issue.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Add production data model, migrations, and query constraints.

remainingFindings.title: State snapshot and localStorage have useful account scoping but should not be treated as full authorization
remainingFindings.remainingReason: D01 localStorage/session scoping must not be treated as complete production authorization.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Replace demo authorization with server sessions and row/server-side scope.

remainingFindings.title: 确认删除
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Dangerous delete fake-success was removed and disabled; real delete/archive behavior is still undefined.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Define delete, archive, undo, and audit rules before opening the action.

remainingFindings.title: 导出周报 / 分享周报 / 查看反馈详情
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Export weekly report, share weekly report, and feedback details remain disabled/unavailable.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Implement together with D06 weekly report product scope and archive backend.

remainingFindings.title: 绘本生成后的保存 / 分享 / 导出
remainingFindings.remainingReason: Storybook generation and refresh persistence use D01; share/export still lacks product scope and submit flow.
remainingFindings.nextAction: Define storybook share/export scope and add version/share-link/file-export flow.

remainingFindings.title: 园长看板和教师工作台空/零状态缺少可断言测试
remainingFindings.remainingReason: D08 covers current director summary and visual-only safety, but D06 weekly report/quality metrics are still pending.
remainingFindings.nextAction: After D06, add zero-state and quality-metric assertions.

implementedFindings.verification: Parent home, archive, storybook, health, diet, reminders, and child scope now use D01-backed data and targeted regression coverage.

featureSmoke.notes: Default run failed because .next/dev/lock made Playwright skip webServer while http://127.0.0.1:3330 was not serving. Rerun with FEATURE_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 passed 9 tests.
